message:
fix(dolt-archive): replace read -ra with while-read for multi-db discovery

The IFS='
' read -ra pattern only captures the first line from a
multi-line here-string, silently dropping all but the first database.
Use a while-read loop (same pattern as the pruning fix in 4c5f269e)
to correctly populate the array from SHOW DATABASES output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -72,7 +72,10 @@ if [[ "$DEFAULT_DBS" == "auto" ]]; then
     log "ERROR: No user databases found on Dolt server at $DOLT_HOST:$DOLT_PORT"
     exit 1
   fi
-  IFS=$'\n' read -ra PROD_DBS <<< "$DISCOVERED"
+  PROD_DBS=()
+  while IFS= read -r _db; do
+    [[ -n "$_db" ]] && PROD_DBS+=("$_db")
+  done <<< "$DISCOVERED"
   log "Discovered ${#PROD_DBS[@]} databases: ${PROD_DBS[*]}"
 else
   IFS=',' read -ra PROD_DBS <<< "$DEFAULT_DBS"
